name: Scalding Gauntlets (Greater)
description: Prized by naari geniekin who prefer to fight with their fists, greater scalding gauntlets are a pair of +2 greater striking flaming spiked gauntlets. The intricate golden gauntlets are engraved with Pyric writing praising the glories of the Dominion of Flame and embellished with shimmering black and red gemstones. A creature you grab or restrain while wearing the gauntlets must succeed at a save or take ] damage and be Sickened 1 from the pain; it's temporarily immune to being sickened by scalding gauntlets for 1 hour.
